goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'huntingdon marriott hotel'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '8 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'mahal of cambridge'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '17:15' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

Make sure you get the reference number

Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
